inputs.label: Total Renovation Area (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.

inputs.label: Scope Complexity
inputs.businessContext: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.

inputs.label: Material Quality Tier
inputs.businessContext: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.

inputs.label: Labor Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.

inputs.label: Contingency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).

inputs.label: Regional Cost Index
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).

inputs.label: Sustainability Target
inputs.businessContext: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.

inputs.label: Phased Renovation
inputs.businessContext: True if renovation is done in phases (e.g., floor by floor) to reduce disruption.

rules.message: Combined waste and contingency exceeds 40% – review project risk assumptions.
High complexity scope requires at least 0.1 hours/sq ft labor efficiency.
Sustainability certification typically requires at least standard material quality.

thresholds.message: Projected cost exceeds 120% of baseline – consider scope reduction or value engineering.
Waste factor above 20% indicates potential process inefficiencies – apply Lean principles.
Labor efficiency factor > 0.3 hours/sq ft – investigate crew training or workflow bottlenecks.

formulas.description: Base material cost per sq ft based on quality tier
formulas.expression: CASE material_quality WHEN 'economy' THEN 25 WHEN 'standard' THEN 50 WHEN 'premium' THEN 90 ELSE 50 END

formulas.description: Complexity multiplier for labor and material
formulas.expression: CASE scope_complexity WHEN 'low' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1.3 WHEN 'high' THEN 1.8 ELSE 1.3 END
CASE sustainability_target WHEN 'none' THEN 0 WHEN 'LEED' THEN 0.15 WHEN 'WELL' THEN 0.20 WHEN 'BREEAM' THEN 0.18 ELSE 0 END

formulas.description: Total material cost including waste and region adjustment
formulas.expression: total_area_sqft * base_material_cost * scope_multiplier * (1 + waste_factor_pct/100) * region_cost_index * (1 + sustainability_surcharge) * phasing_efficiency

formulas.description: Total labor cost based on efficiency and scope

primary.label: Total Renovation Budget
primary.description: Estimated total cost including materials, labor, and contingency.

material_cost.label: Material Cost
material_cost.description: Total material cost including waste and sustainability surcharge.

labor_cost.label: Labor Cost
labor_cost.description: Total labor cost based on efficiency and scope.

cost_per_sqft.label: Cost per Square Foot
cost_per_sqft.description: Total budget divided by total area.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Material Waste Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess material cost due to waste factor above 5% baseline.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Labor Productivity Gap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional labor cost if efficiency factor exceeds industry benchmark of 0.12 hours/sq ft.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Scope Creep Allowance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden cost from complexity multiplier above baseline (low complexity = 1.0).

suggestedActions.label: Implement Lean Material Management
suggestedActions.description: Adopt just-in-time delivery and prefabrication to reduce waste factor below 10%.

suggestedActions.label: Enhance Crew Training & Workflow
suggestedActions.description: Use time-motion studies and standardized work to lower labor efficiency factor to 0.12.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct Value Engineering Review
suggestedActions.description: Evaluate scope complexity and material quality trade-offs to reduce cost without compromising function.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Phasing Schedule
suggestedActions.description: If not phased, consider phasing to reduce disruption and potentially lower labor overtime costs.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Confidence-Adjusted Budget
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Budget adjusted by a confidence factor based on input variability (e.g., 0.9 for medium confidence).
